'''bashodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hstead|hstead]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-sh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hstead|hstead]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| bashodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæshedeth|bæshedeth]] || [[word:bæshedej|bæshedej]] || [[word:bæshedesh|bæshedesh]] || [[word:bæshede|bæshede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bashoshodoth|bashoshodoth]] || [[word:bashoshodoj|bashoshodoj]] || [[word:bashoshodosh|bashoshodosh]] || [[word:bashoshodo|bashoshodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bashodoth|bashodoth]] || [[word:bashodoj|bashodoj]] || [[word:bashodosh|bashodosh]] || [[word:bashodo|bashodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bashofdoth|bashofdoth]] || [[word:bashofdoj|bashofdoj]] || [[word:bashofdosh|bashofdosh]] || [[word:bashofdof|bashofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bashodotho|bashodotho]] || [[word:bashodojo|bashodojo]] || [[word:bashodosho|bashodosho]] || [[word:bashodoko|bashodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bashodoth|bashodoth]] || [[word:bashodoj|bashodoj]] || [[word:bashodosh|bashodosh]] || [[word:bashodo|bashodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bashodothol|bashodothol]] || [[word:bashodojol|bashodojol]] || [[word:bashodoshol|bashodoshol]] || [[word:bashodokol|bashodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bashodothotho|bashodothotho]] || [[word:bashodojojo|bashodojojo]] || [[word:bashodoshosho|bashodoshosho]] || [[word:bashodoko|bashodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bashodothon|bashodothon]] || [[word:bashodojon|bashodojon]] || [[word:bashodoshon|bashodoshon]] || [[word:bashodokon|bashodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bashodothoro|bashodothoro]] || [[word:bashodojoro|bashodojoro]] || [[word:bashodoshoro|bashodoshoro]] || [[word:bashodokoro|bashodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
